s-1.ptxt: INSTALL CLUTCH MASTER CYLINDER PUSH ROD CLEVIS BUSHING

s2.ptxt: Apply MP grease to the inside of a new clevis bushing.
Install the clevis bushing to the clutch pedal.

atten4.ptxt: Install the clevis bushing from the left side of the vehicle.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL CLUTCH PEDAL TURNOVER BUSHING

s2.ptxt: Apply MP grease to the inside of the turnover bushing.
Install the turnover bushing to the clutch pedal.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL NO. 1 CLUTCH PEDAL CUSHION

s2.ptxt: Using needle-nose pliers, install the 2 No. 1 clutch pedal cushions to the clutch pedal.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL CLUTCH PEDAL BUSHING

s2.ptxt: Apply MP grease to the inner, outer and end surfaces of 2 new pedal bushings.
Install the clutch pedal shaft collar and 2 pedal bushings to the clutch pedal.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL CLUTCH PEDAL PAD

s2.ptxt: Install the clutch pedal pad to the clutch pedal.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL CLUTCH PEDAL SPRING HOLDER

s2.ptxt: Apply MP grease to the inside of a new clutch pedal spring holder.
Install the clutch pedal spring holder.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL CLUTCH PEDAL SUB-ASSEMBLY

s2.ptxt: Install the clutch pedal to the clutch pedal support with the bolt and nut.

atten4.ptxt: Install the bolt from the right side of the vehicle.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL PEDAL WITH HOOK SPRING

s2.ptxt: Apply MP grease to the sliding portion of the spring.
Install the hook spring.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL TORSION SPRING

s2.ptxt: Apply MP grease to the sliding portion of the spring.
Install the torsion spring.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL CLUTCH PEDAL SUPPORT SUB-ASSEMBLY

s2.ptxt: Install the clutch pedal support to the vehicle with the 2 nuts and bolt.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL CLUTCH MASTER CYLINDER PUSH ROD CLEVIS PIN

s2.ptxt: Apply MP grease to the contact surface of the pin and clevis bushing.
Connect the clevis to the clutch pedal with the pin and a new clip.

atten4.ptxt: Install the pin from the left side of the vehicle.

s-1.ptxt: CONNECT CONNECTORS

s2.ptxt: Connect the clutch start switch connector.
Connect the clutch switch connector (with cruise control).

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL COMBINATION METER ASSEMBLY (for TMC Made)

s2.ptxt: Connect each connector.
Install the combination meter assembly with the 4 screws <E>.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL COMBINATION METER ASSEMBLY (for TMMK Made)

s2.ptxt: Connect each connector.
Install the combination meter assembly with the 4 screws <R>.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL INSTRUMENT CLUSTER FINISH PANEL

s2.ptxt: Engage the guide and the 4 claws.
Install the instrument cluster finish panel with the 2 clips.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL LOWER INSTRUMENT PANEL FINISH PANEL (w/o Smart Key System)

s2.ptxt: Engage the 2 claws and 2 clips to install the lower instrument panel finish panel.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL LOWER INSTRUMENT PANEL FINISH PANEL (w/ Smart Key System)

s2.ptxt: Connect the connector.
Engage the 2 claws and 2 clips to install the lower instrument panel finish panel.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL NO. 1 INSTRUMENT PANEL SUB-ASSEMBLY

s2.ptxt: Connect the connector.
Engage the 3 claws and 2 clips to install the No. 1 instrument panel sub-assembly.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL LOWER INSTRUMENT PANEL FINISH PANEL LH (for TMC Made)

s2.ptxt: Install the air hose and connect the connector.
Engage the claw and the 9 clips.
Instal the instrument panel finish panel LH with the screw <B> and bolt <A>.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL LOWER INSTRUMENT PANEL FINISH PANEL LH (for TMMK Made)

s2.ptxt: Install the air hose and connect the connector.
Engage the claw and the 9 clips.

Instal the instrument panel finish panel LH with the screw or

and bolt .

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL COWL SIDE TRIM SUB-ASSEMBLY LH

s2.ptxt: Engage the 2 clips.
Install the cowl side trim sub-assembly LH with the cowl side trim clip.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL FRONT DOOR SCUFF PLATE LH

s2.ptxt: Engage the 7 claws and 3 clips, then install the front door scuff plate LH.

s-1.ptxt: CONNECT CABLE TO NEGATIVE BATTERY TERMINAL
INSPECT AND ADJUST CLUTCH PEDAL SUB-ASSEMBLY
